_README: FAQ content from Anna — bulk-uploaded to Strapi via upload-faqs.ps1.
1. Get Anna's FAQs (Word doc, message, Google Doc, whatever).
2. Paste each question + answer into the right page-slug array below.
3. Run ./upload-faqs.ps1 — it deletes existing FAQs for each populated page and replaces with the new ones.
- A page with an empty array `[]` is SKIPPED (existing FAQs stay untouched).
- A page with entries gets fully REPLACED (old FAQs deleted, new ones created).
- Markdown links work in answers: [text](url). Use absolute paths like /the-work/the-reset.
- Use `\n\n` for paragraph breaks in long answers.
Page slugs must match the FAQ enum exactly. If Anna adds a new page slug, also add it to:

the-reset.q: Example: How is The Reset different from therapy?
the-reset.a: Replace this with Anna's real answer. Markdown links work too: [book a call](/contact).
